question: Will the S&P 500 be above 6924.9999 on Apr 10, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 is currently around 6,812 and needs to reach above 6,925 by 4pm today - a gain of approximately 1.7%. While markets have been rallying on Iran ceasefire news with seven consecutive days of gains, the index faces technical resistance at the 50-day moving average of 6,771. The timeframe is extremely short (same day), making such a move possible but unlikely given current levels and typical intraday volatility patterns.
